programme.desc: Newsmagazine with features focusing on people, and events in the news and behind the headlines.

programme.title: Marshals
programme.desc: The Marshals go manhunting after receiving a tip that a dangerous fugitive is on the loose; Kayce and Cal struggle to reckon with their time at war when a former SEAL brother drifts back into their lives as they hunt a vicious enemy.

programme.desc: Colter is hired to find a teen girl who went missing from a friend's house during a tragic triple homicide.

programme.desc: Following his brain tumor diagnosis, Watson goes on medical leave to seek treatment; a notorious South American dictator demands Watson see to his mysterious autoimmune condition personally.
